electronics.name: MXR® DIME DISTORTION

electronics.name: MXR® DOOKIE DRIVE™ PEDAL
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION In celebration of the 25th anniversary of Green Day's groundbreaking album Dookie, this pedal captures the dirty yet articulate sound Billie Joe Armstrong used on that record, combining the sounds of two modded amplifiers into a single stomp box for a harmonic range full of depth and dimension. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: JIMI HENDRIX® CRY BABY® WAH

electronics.name: JIMI HENDRIX® FUZZ FACE® DISTORTION LIMITED EDITION

electronics.name: CRY BABY® STANDARD WAH

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® CAMEL TOE™ TRIPLE OVERDRIVE MKII
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: MXR® DC BRICK™ POWER SUPPLY
electronics.description: A revamp of the DCB10, this power supply handles twice the power and comes with eight 9v outputs, each equipped with a red LED to indicate a short, and two 18v outputs. This pedal can be powered by the included ECB009 18-volt adapter.

electronics.name: MXR® ISO-BRICK™ POWER SUPPLY
electronics.description: This power supply is light and pedalboard-friendly with ten fully isolated outputs ranging from 9V to 18V—including two variable 6V–15V outputs—and special noise-reduction circuitry for quiet operation. This pedal can be powered by the included ECB009 18-volt adapter.

electronics.name: MXR® MINI ISO-BRICK™ POWER SUPPLY
electronics.description: Whether you need a space-saving solution for your downsized travel board or you just need to power a small, carefully curated selection of tried-and-true staples, this little box has what you need—all while taking up less space than a candy bar. This pedal can be powered by the included ECB009 18-volt adapter.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® CONQUISTADOR™ FUZZSTORTION
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This aggressive gated fuzz conquers sonic frontiers with ease and simplicity. Just use the classic Volume, Tone, Fuzz control setup to dial in your sound and then play a soundtrack to shred the space-time continuum.

electronics.name: MXR® DOUBLE-DOUBLE™ OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The MXR Double-Double Overdrive serves up two classic overdrives in a single housing, selectable with the flick of a switch—a Low Gain circuit for rich, fiery midrange tones and a High Gain circuit that kicks up the gain and emphasizes highs and lows—with tone controls to season your overdriven sound. This pedal can be powered by a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® ECHO-PUSS™ ANALOG DELAY
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The Echo-Puss Analog Delay delivers up to 600ms of organic delay with Tone and Blend controls and a fully tweakable LFO modulation circuit so you can add a liquid texture to the delay signal. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: HEIL TALK BOX

electronics.name: CRY BABY® 535Q MULTI-WAH CHROME

electronics.name: JIMI HENDRIX™ '69 PSYCH SERIES BAND OF GYPSYS™ FUZZ
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Get the unique and bitingly aggressive Band of Gypsys™ fuzz sound in an MXR mini housing with a Tone control for sonic fine-tuning. Equipped with modern features such as a status LED, true-bypass switching, and a 9-volt power jack, this pedal comes emblazoned with the trippy, kaleidoscopic designs of award-winning UK-based design crüe ILOVEDUST. This pedal can be powered by a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: ROCKMAN® GUITAR ACE
electronics.description: This headphone amp lets you rock out with great tone without disturbing your housemates or neighbors. The Guitar Ace features semi and heavy distortion modes for riff and solo experimentation. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery or a Dunlop ECB005X Rockman® Ace power adapter kit (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® RAIJIN DRIVE™ PEDAL
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal takes iconic Japanese overdrive and distortion tones and upgrades them with greater tonal range and usability so that those beloved sounds can keep up with the modern tone chase. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® PHASE 99
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The Phase 99 combines two Phase 90 circuits in a single housing with Modern/Vintage, Series/Parallel, and Sync switches for ultimate phaser experimentation. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® SCRIPT PHASE 90 - LED
electronics.description: The Script Phase 90 combines vintage phasing with an LED and AC power jack for modern convenience. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® ILOVEDUST CARBON COPY® ANALOG DELAY
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This limited edition of the world's bestselling analog delay comes decked out in the bold, brazen art of the award-winning UK-based design crüe ILOVEDUST.

electronics.name: CRY BABY® STANDARD WAH BOTTOM PLATE REPLACEMENT KIT
electronics.description: This is a replacement bottom plate set for the GCB95 Cry Baby Standard Wah. Includes battery box, 4 replacement rubber feet, and screws.

electronics.name: VOLUME (X)™ MINI PEDAL TREAD
electronics.description: This is a replacement tread for the Volume (X) Mini Pedal.

electronics.name: JIMI HENDRIX® FUZZ FACE® DISTORTION
electronics.description: The Jimi Hendrix Fuzz Face Distortion is a meticulously faithful reproduction of the one used on classic albums such as Electric Ladyland. This pedal can only be powered by one 9-volt battery (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® CLONE LOOPER™ PEDAL
electronics.description: Whether you're practicing at home, captivating audiences with improvisational compositions onstage, or weaving intricate sonic tapestries in the studio, the Clone Looper Pedal has you covered. Packed into a standard MXR ® housing that's built like a tank, it's easier to use and delivers higher fidelity signal reproduction than any other looper of its type—hands down. This pedal can be powered by the included Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® DOOKIE DRIVE™ PEDAL V2
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal recreates the sounds of the two heavily modified amplifiers—represented as separate and blendable High Gain and Crunch Gain circuits—that Billie Joe Armstrong used to get his dirty-yet-articulate sound when recording Green Day’s groundbreaking record, Dookie. This version features special edition artwork that contrasts the most explosive element of the Dookie album cover with a brushed aluminum casting for a look that's sleek yet rugged. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® THUMP™ BASS PREAMP
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal combines the tone-sweetening magic of the Echoplex® Preamp with a three-band EQ and midrange frequency adjustment so that you can dial in the perfect bass tone to punch up a solo, boost your signal in a live mix, sculpt more edge into the sound of a passive bass, and more. This pedal can be powered by a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® TIMMY® OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: This pedal provides a huge, responsive range of gritty and textured tones that enhance the sound of your rig while preserving its fundamental character—and in an MXR mini housing, this pedal will free up some serious pedalboard space. This pedal is powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or an MXR Brick Series power supply. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: MXR® DOOKIE DRIVE™ PEDAL V3
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION To celebrate the launch of Green Day's eclectic thirteenth studio album "Father of All...", this special limited edition version of the Dookie Drive Pedal features the album cover's rainbow-upchucking unicorn over a brushed aluminum housing. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: MXR® OCTAVIO® FUZZ
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Explore the furthest reaches of silicon saturation in a trusted vessel with the MXR Octavio Fuzz. Just set the Level and Fuzz controls to your desired volume and intensity, and allow your picking and plucking dynamics to coax out the pedal's legendarily searing, synth-like tones. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ PORK & PICKLE™ OVERDRIVE & FUZZ
electronics.description: Now in a Way Huge Smalls housing, the Pork & Pickle Bass Overdrive & Fuzz serves up a perfectly balanced diet of gnarly tones for bass players who like to get down and dirty. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ SWOLLEN PICKLE® FUZZ
electronics.description: The Way Huge Smalls Swollen Pickle Jumbo Fuzz concentrates all the potent flavors of its predecessors into a super pedalboard-friendly housing with a simpler interface so that you can plug in and serve up savory saturation in no time at all. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: SIETE SANTOS™ OCTAVIO® FUZZ
electronics.description: This pedal's searing circuit is based on the Jimi Hendrix™ Octavio® Fuzz, updated for the Reverend Billy F. Gibbons with a 7-band EQ for tone sculpting and an AC power jack This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: CRY BABY® Q ZONE™ FIXED WAH
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Get the rich, resonant vocality of a fixed-position Cry Baby Wah in a standard pedal box with this reissue of the Cry Baby Q Zone Fixed Wah. This pedal can be powered by a 9-volt battery, a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® GEISHA DRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The Way Huge Geisha Drive is a special edition of the Way Huge Drive. Limited to 40 pieces, each pedal has been assembled, dated, serial numbered, and signed by Jeorge Tripps' own hand.

electronics.name: MXR® EVH117 FLANGER
electronics.description: The EVH Flanger features an Unchained switch for instant EVH tone and comes fittingly adorned with Eddie's famous striped graphics. This pedal can be powered by two 9-volt batteries, a 18-volt adapter or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™ and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies.

electronics.name: CRY BABY® Q MINI 535Q AUTO-RETURN WAH
electronics.description: At half the size of a standard wah, this Cry Baby Wah provides the perfect balance of wah control, pedalboard-efficiency, and onstage convenience.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ GREEN RHINO™ OVERDRIVE MKV
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal packs the Green Rhino Overdrive's beloved stampede of gritty, gnarly overdrive tones into a super pedalboard-friendly housing.

electronics.name: MXR® FOD™ DRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The MXR FOD Drive recreates the experience of blending the overdriven sounds of two highly coveted amp stacks right from your pedalboard. This pedal can be powered by a Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies (not included).

electronics.name: TOM MORELLO CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: Get the exact same aggressive and expressive wah that Tom Morello has used throughout his career with a custom finish that highlights the battle for justice that he's dedicated his craft to. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: MXR® TREMOLO
electronics.description: This return of the tremolo effect to the MXR line combines a full historical range of masterfully tuned tremolo styles with a host of features to satisfy the performance needs of today's discerning players. This pedal is powered by 9 volts (180mA) and can be powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or an MXR Brick Series power supply. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: CRY BABY® JUNIOR WAH
electronics.description: The Cry Baby Junior Wah features front-mounted jacks and an 8" housing for clean configurations on the world's most popular boards so that you don't have to choose between a tidy layout and your Cry Baby Wah fix.

electronics.name: VOLUME (X)™ 8 PEDAL
electronics.description: The Volume (X)8 Pedal features an 8" housing to give you the most efficient use of your pedalboard space.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® ATREIDES™ ANALOG WEIRDING MODULE
electronics.description: The Way Huge Atreides Analog Weirding Module offers a kaleidoscope of organic synth-like tones, generating an explosion of growly sub-octave, expressive vocal envelope, swooshing phase, and gnarly fuzz.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® PENNY SAVER ROYALE® MODULATION & OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal unites Joe Bonamassa's beloved Way Huge pedals in a single housing—the Overrated Special™ Overdrive and the Blue Hippo™ Chorus. This pedal is available through Joe Bonamassa's Shop

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ STO OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This little box offers a fast ride to overdriven paradise, delivering smooth, pillowy overdrive straight out of Nashville honky tonks.

electronics.name: MXR® DEEP PHASE™
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The MXR Deep Phase Pedal delivers uniquely expressive vintage phaser tones with the impeccable build quality and tweakabiity that MXR is famous for. This pedal is powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or an MXR ® Brick Series power supply. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: JUSTIN CHANCELLOR CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: This custom Cry Baby Wah combines three of Justin Chancellor's favorite ways to explore tones and craft soundscapes—filter, wah, and fuzz.

electronics.name: MXR® TOM MORELLO POWER 50™ OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: For more than 30 years, the key component of Tom Morello’s raw, hard-hitting sonic voice has been his amp setup. The MXR Power 50 Overdrive captures the sound and functionality of that setup for use with any rig, whether you have a simple combo amp or a high-end custom stack. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (accessible via battery door on bottom plate), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® POLY BLUE OCTAVE
electronics.description: The MXR Poly Blue Octave brings modern and classic pitch-shifting styles together with fuzz and modulation to create the ultimate octave pedal for tonecrafters and sonic seekers. The MXR Poly Blue Octave is powered by a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU or an MXR Brick Series power supply. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: LEO NOCENTELLI CRY BABY® MARDI GRAS WAH
electronics.description: The Leo Nocentelli Cry Baby Mardi Gras Wah pays tribute to a master of funk, the magical city he was born and raised in, and the greasiest effect ever conceptualized.

electronics.name: KIRK HAMMETT COLLECTION CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: The Kirk Hammett Collection Cry Baby Wah delivers the heavy metal legend’s signature wah tones in a special edition purple sparkle finish. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: CRY BABY® JUNIOR WAH SPECIAL EDITION WHITE
electronics.description: Proclaim your allegiance to the most iconic effect pedal in music history with this special edition of the Cry Baby Junior Wah, featuring a bold Cry Baby ‘wave logo' pattern and contrasting footwear-inspired tread. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ RED LLAMA
electronics.description: Celebrating the 30th anniversary of Way Huge, the beloved RL2 Red Llama Overdrive (Way Huge’s first production pedal, introduced in 1992) returns with a vengeance. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: MXR® DUKE OF TONE™ OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: Designed in conjunction with indie pedal builder Analog Man, the MXR Duke of Tone Overdrive is for players who want to add a touch of warmth and grit to their rig while allowing the natural tone and feel of their high-end gear to shine. This product is powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or an MXR® BrickTM Series power supply. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: MXR® SUPER BADASS® DYNAMIC O.D.
electronics.description: With MOSFET clipping diodes under the hood, the MXR Super Badass Dynamic O.D. growls with a smooth purr that can be pulled back for a nice, clean boost or cranked into full gear for vintage high-gain grind—all while preserving your rig's tonal dynamics. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (accessible via battery door on bottom plate), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR BrickTM Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® FAT SUGAR™ DRIVE
electronics.description: The MXR Fat Sugar Drive brings the Sugar Drive’s diverse range of clear and transparent overdrive tones to MXR’s classic housing for players who prefer its footprint over that of the mini. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (accessed via underside of pedal), the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal delivers unparalleled versatility, combining discrete clean and overdrive signal paths in an optimum ratio for a dynamic, finger-friendly experience with plug-and-play simplicity.

electronics.name: JERRY CANTRELL FIREFLY CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: This special edition of the Jerry Cantrell Cry Baby Wah is inspired by the frontman’s latest solo record, Brighten, with glow-in-the-dark features and a subdued raw-iron finish. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ ATTACK VECTOR™ PHASER & ENVELOPE
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal combines a phase shifter and an envelope filter into a single dangerous machine for fifty shades of rude behavior that’ll turn a pleasant cocktail party into a drunken brawl.

electronics.name: AUTHENTIC HENDRIX™ '68 SHRINE SERIES FUZZ FACE® DISTORTION
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Donning a custom finish that features celebrated rock artist John Van Hamersveld’s famous 1968 Shrine Auditorium Jimi Hendrix concert poster art r emixed by Simon Berndt of One Horse Town Illustration , this pedal captures two different flavors of Jimi Hendrix fuzz tones in a single mini housing—aggressive silicon crunch and warm, smooth germanium saturation.

electronics.name: AUTHENTIC HENDRIX™ '68 SHRINE SERIES OCTAVIO® FUZZ
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Donning a custom finish that features celebrated rock artist John Van Hamersveld’s famous 1968 Shrine Auditorium Jimi Hendrix concert poster art r emixed by Simon Berndt of One Horse Town Illustration , this pedal updates the circuitry of the original cheese wedge Octavio Fuzz for modern players and pedalboards.

electronics.name: AUTHENTIC HENDRIX™ '68 SHRINE SERIES UNI-VIBE® CHORUS/VIBRATO
electronics.description: Donning a custom finish that features celebrated rock artist John Van Hamersveld’s famous 1968 Shrine Auditorium Jimi Hendrix concert poster art r emixed by Simon Berndt of One Horse Town Illustration , this pedal delivers that classic wash of tones and textures in all of their stunning glory. *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION

electronics.name: AUTHENTIC HENDRIX™ '68 SHRINE SERIES BAND OF GYPSYS™ FUZZ
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Donning a custom finish that features celebrated rock artist John Van Hamersveld’s famous 1968 Shrine Auditorium Jimi Hendrix concert poster art r emixed by Simon Berndt of One Horse Town Illustration , this pedal recreates the mysterious snarling fuzz tone the guitar legend used at several iconic live performances.

electronics.name: MXR® X THIRD MAN HARDWARE DOUBLE DOWN™ PEDAL
electronics.description: MXR and Third Man Hardware have teamed up to create the perfect booster for gigging guitar players—this pedal combines two separate MXR Micro Amp circuits into a single box so that you can heat up two separate signal chains with just the right amount of classic Micro Amp bump. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: CRY BABY® DAREDEVIL™ FUZZ WAH
electronics.description: A collaboration with Daredevil Pedals proprietor and pedal builder Johnny Wator, this Cry Baby Wah combines the bright, aggressive vocality of a modded Cry Baby Wah with a custom fuzz circuit that’s downright gnarly. This product is powered by one 9-volt battery (accessed via underside of pedal), the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or the DC Brick™, Iso-Brick™, and Mini Iso-Brick™ power supplies.

electronics.name: MXR® BASS DI+ SPECIAL EDITION YELLOW
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This special edition Bass D.I.+ features a custom limited edition finish.

electronics.name: MXR® 50TH ANNIVERSARY PHASE 90
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Join us as we celebrate that legacy with a special edition 50th anniversary finish—this pedal is worthy of a privileged place in your finest display case, but it’ll fit perfectly on your pedalboard, too. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® HYBRID FUZZ
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION This pedal combines two iconic Fuzz Face Distortion sounds, featuring the snarling, high-gain aggression of a silicon transistor and the smooth, shaggy warmth of a germanium transistor in a single circuit. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® BLACKOUT™ SERIES BASS COMPRESSOR
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION The MXR Blackout Series Bass Compressor features a stealthy matte black housing with gloss black text and a bright yellow LED for a super sharp aesthetic to match this pedal’s exceptional sound and performance. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® BLACKOUT™ SERIES BASS ENVELOPE FILTER
electronics.description: The MXR Blackout Series Bass Envelope Filter features a stealthy matte black housing with gloss black text and a bright yellow LED for an aesthetic that’s as slick as the pedal’s classic analog envelope filter tones. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: AKIRA TAKASAKI CRY BABY® FUZZ WAH
electronics.description: Specially designed for Japanese guitar legend Akira Takasaki, this Cry Baby Wah features a lower frequency sweep and a switchable fuzz circuit for expressive leads infused with fiery harmonics. Features auto-return switching, LED indicators, and more.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ STONE BURNER™ SUB ATOMIC FUZZ
electronics.description: This pedal combines ferocious fuzz and thunderous sub octave signals to put you in touch with your freaky side.

electronics.name: MXR® WYLDE AUDIO PHASE
electronics.description: This pedal adds dimension and dynamics to Zakk Wylde's legendarily blazing solos and razor sharp leads. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® WYLDE AUDIO CHORUS
electronics.description: This pedal is Zakk Wylde's secret weapon for thickening up walls of distortion and adding liquid dimension and texture to clean passages. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® WYLDE AUDIO OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: Custom built for Zakk Wylde’s relentless riffs and leads, this muscular stomp box will transform your amp into a heavy crunch machine. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

KIRK HAMMETT CRY BABY® WAH BOTTOM PLATE
SLASH CRY BABY® WAH RUBBER TREAD
BUDDY GUY CRY BABY® WAH RUBBER TREAD
KIRK HAMMETT CRY BABY® WAH RUBBER TREAD

MXR® JOSHUA® AMBIENT ECHO
electronics.description: The MXR Joshua Ambient Echo is your ticket to iconic sonic sanctuaries, featuring a foundation of carefully concocted tones and textures, highly customizable delay, and other features to help you craft soundscapes worthy of tonal trips out of the ’60s and ’70s and ethereal ambience from the ’80s. This pedal requires 9 volts (300mA) and can be powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or the MXR Iso-Brick Pro, Iso-Brick, and Mini Iso-Brick power supplies. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: MXR® ISO-BRICK™ PRO POWER SUPPLY
electronics.description: The MXR Iso-Brick Pro Power Supply delivers clean, steady voltages to a diverse range of pedal types in a sleek form factor so that you can confidently power your entire board without any extra bulk.

electronics.name: WYLDE AUDIO CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: Finely tuned to Zakk Wylde's specs, this Cry Baby Wah delivers a thick, cutting kick to the pants every time you hit the switch.

electronics.name: MXR® GRAN TORINO™ BOOST OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: The MXR Gran Torino Boost Overdrive amplifies and enriches the natural sound of your rig with the warm, organic sound of classic tube amps, from clean boosting with rich sustain to smooth, mellow overdrive.

electronics.name: MXR® TRS SPLIT + TAP
electronics.description: The MXR Split + Tap is a compact footswitch that combines a passive TRS splitter with a responsive tap tempo control, all in a single compact-yet-robust unit.

electronics.name: MXR® RANDY RHOADS DISTORTION +
electronics.description: A tribute to Randy Rhoads' monumental legacy, this pedal has been painstakingly matched to the legend's own MXR Distortion+ to recreate the same raw, overdriven tones heard on his most beloved hits. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® LAYERS™ PEDAL
electronics.description: The MXR Layers Pedal blooms with rich, organic sustain that imbues every strum and pluck with resonance and depth—pull off chord voicings you never thought possible, compose transcendent melodies, orchestrate harmonic ensembles, create lively stereo pads, and more—all from a standard MXR housing. This pedal requires a 9-volt (300mA) center-negative power supply and can be powered by the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter or the MXR Iso-Brick, the Iso-Brick Pro, and the Iso-Brick Mini Power Supplies. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.

electronics.name: MXR® PRIME DISTORTION
electronics.description: If you crave the classic growl and bite of hard-clipping vintage stompboxes, look no further than the MXR Prime Distortion. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: MXR® YNGWIE MALMSTEEN OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: This pedal delivers clarity, expressive dynamics, and rich harmonics—all perfectly tailored for Yngwie Malmsteen's light-speed arpeggios, expressive vibrato, and big, bold riffs. This pedal is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003/ECB003EU, or an MXR Brick Series power supply.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ DEEP STATE™ CONSPIRACY THEORY™ DIODES OVERDRIVE
electronics.description: A modified version of the of the Conspiracy Theory Overdrive, this pedal features a special diode with a magical-sounding voltage drop that delivers smooth, velvety clipping that responds to playing dynamics like you wouldn’t believe.

electronics.name: MXR® DOOKIE DRIVE™ PEDAL 30TH ANNIVERSARY
electronics.description: This special edition features an all-new finish to celebrate the 30th anniversary of Green Day's monumental release in 1994: Dookie. This pedal is powered by one 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), the Dunlop ECB003 9-volt adapter, or an MXR® Brick™ Series power supply.

electronics.name: WAY HUGE® SMALLS™ GEISHA DRIVE BLUE

electronics.name: KIRK HAMMETT CRY BABY® WAH YELLOW SPARKLE EDITION

electronics.name: SEPULTURA 40TH ANNIVERSARY CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: *LEGACY PRODUCT / NO LONGER IN PRODUCTION Celebrating Sepultura’s 40th anniversary and farewell tour, this limited edition Cry Baby Wah was a collab between Dunlop and iconic wah-wah master Andreas Kisser.

electronics.name: MICK RONSON CRY BABY® WAH
electronics.description: The Mick Ronson Cry Baby Wah taps into the vibrant, melodic character of one of rock ’n’ roll’s most gifted songwriters with a recreation of his own personal wah pedal.

electronics.name: MXR® BASS SYNTH
electronics.description: Designed with low-end professor and tone connoisseur Ian Martin Allison, the MXR Bass Synth is a powerhouse of a pedal offers thunderous sub-octave, expressive envelope, and lush modulation effects with killer tracking and sustain—plus all the features you need to shape every detail of your tone. This pedal cannot be powered by a battery.
